arts.ttl: Barcelona predicted lineup vs Atletico Madrid
arts.sum: Barcelona will book their place in the Copa del Rey final with another victory in the Spanish capital on Wednesday night. Madrid has been a happy hunting ground for the La Liga leaders this season, with Hansi Flick's side claiming memorable victories in the capital's two grand amphitheatres.

arts.ttl: Ter Stegen ‘feeling fitter than ever’ after returning to Barca training
arts.sum: Marc-Andre ter Stegen says he’s feeling great after returning to team training at Barcelona after six months out with a serious knee injury. Hansi Flick spoke about Ter Stegen earlier today and admits it’s great to have the goalkeeper back in training but refused to put on a date on when he might be ready to play again.

arts.ttl: Barcelona face Champions League player registration dilemma
arts.sum: Hansi Flick faces a major personnel decision during the Champions League knockout stages.

arts.ttl: Watch: Injured Erling Haaland arrives in Barcelona
arts.sum: Footage of Manchester City star Erling Haaland arriving in Barcelona has come to the fore on Tuesday evening. The name of frontman Haaland has of course dominated the headlines in…

arts.ttl: Barcelona injury news: Hansi Flick confirms fitness boost ahead of Atletico Madrid Copa del Rey semi-final clash
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick reveals whether Pau Cubarsi and Raphinha will be able to start Wednesday's Copa del Rey semi-final second leg against Atletico Madrid.

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid quoted €45m to complete “almost impossible” deal for Manchester City target
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid have set their sights on one of the South America’s brightest talents, but signing him will not be easy – and not only because Manchester City are also said to be sniffing around. Last week, it was reported that Atleti have registered their interest in Franco Mastantuono. The teenage attacker had been closely […] The post Atletico Madrid quoted €45m to complete “almost impossible” deal for Manchester City target appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barcelona ‘studying the signing’ of Edward Cedeño
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona are taking into consideration the signing of an up-and-coming midfield talent. That’s according to Diario Sport, who point towards Edward Cedeño as the…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick talks Ter Stegen comeback as goalkeeper returns to training
arts.sum: Barcelona received quite the boost on Monday as club captain and starting goalkeeper Marc-André ter Stegen returned to training with his teammates for the first time since suffering a gruesome knee injury against Villarreal back in September. The German is now on the path to making a comeback sometime before the end of the season, and Hansi Flick was asked in a press conference on Tuesday when Ter Stegen could be making his return.

arts.ttl: Where to Watch FC Barcelona vs Atletico Madrid for Copa Del Rey Semifinal
arts.sum: FC Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will face off in the second leg of their Copa del Rey semifinal tie on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Barcelona announced as venue for England’s World Cup qualifier against Andorra
arts.sum: The game will be played at the RCDE Stadium, home of Espanyol.
